title: Global Gamerule
description: Sync all gamerules across all worlds
body:
Due to how Bukkit loads worlds, each world gets its own set of gamerules. This plugin simply will sync all of those gamerules across all of the known loaded worlds. 

[![Partner link for Nodecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c739515703b015d95ffc02ebf61007530480bd20.jpeg)](https://nodecraft.com/r/mja00) **Note: I do not make any money off this link. It's fully non-monetized.**
